{{Quote|Her name is Faye, Faye Patrick. She looks sweet but she'll cut you up before you get done saying hello.|[[Bandor Mokk]], to a spacer|<ref name="SWG:TtB" />}}
'''Faye Patrick''' was a female [[Zabrak/Legends|Zabrak]] criminal who lived on [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==Biography==
{{Quote|So Faye finally found someone meaner than her?|Bandor Mokk, to the spacer who killed Faye Patrick|<ref name="SWG:TtB" />}}
[[File:FayePatrick.jpg|thumb|left|150px|Mug shot of Faye Patrick]]
Faye Patrick was an expert in [[Teräs Käsi/Legends|Teräs Käsi]] from [[Coronet City/Legends|Coronet City]].<ref name="web" /> By the time following the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], Faye Patrick was part of a group of [[Corellian slavers]] active in and around the city of [[Tyrena/Legends|Tyrena]].<ref name="SWG:TtB" /> The slavers were responsible for a 500% increase in the number of missing persons on Corellia in one month.<ref name="web" /> Patrick usually seduced then drugged men before selling them to the slave ring. She also captured the [[Zorgom Z'all|Z'all]] [[Norith Z'all|family]].<ref name="SWG:TtB" /> At some point, she was suspected by the [[Corellian Security Force]] to be involved. Major [[Alana Walden]] was investigating the case, and pleaded with citizens to report Faye's location to CorSec.<ref name="web" />

In [[1 ABY/Legends|1 ABY]],<ref name="SWG_timeline" /> the slave ring operations were discovered after a group of slaves led by [[Kyran Silene]] managed to escape the [[Corellian Slaver Bunker|slaver bunker]] near Tyrena. Kyran contacted his friend [[Bandor Mokk]] but the [[Bothan/Legends|Bothan]] was watched by Faye Patrick who threatened his life. Kyran's wife, [[Madison Silene]], later recruited a spacer to investigate the disappearance of her husband. The spacer convinced Mokk to talk about Faye Patrick and the escaped slaves. The spacer eventually fought and killed Patrick in a street of Tyrena.<ref name="SWG:TtB" /> After the death of Faye Patrick, the spacer met Kyran Silene and helped him to reveal the slaver operations to the CorSec.<ref name="SWG:IE">{{SWGcite|exp=NGE|type=class|Legacy|Incriminating Evidence|Corellia}}</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
Faye Patrick appeared as a non-player character in the [[2003]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]'', a [[Wikipedia:Massively multiplayer online role-playing game|massively multiplayer online roleplaying game]] developed by [[Sony]] Online Entertainment and published by [[LucasArts]],<ref name="SWG:TtB" /> prior to its closure on [[December 15]], [[2011]].<ref name="Shutdown">{{SonyCite|url=playerinfo|text=IMPORTANT INFORMATION ABOUT ''STAR WARS'' GALAXIES™}}</ref> Faye Patrick was added to the game with the update named "[[W:c:swg:Chapter 1|Chapter 1: The Corellian Captives]]," published on [[June 8]], [[2006]].<ref name="SonyForumsCite-Chapter 1: The Corellian Captives, Publish Notes, June 8th">{{SonyForumsCite|url=swg/board/message?board.id=DevDiscussion&message.id=48548|text="Chapter 1: The Corellian Captives", Publish Notes, June 8th}}</ref>
